exercise_requirement: Lowercase and tokenize descriptions, reserve pad and unknown tokens, and display raw text, tokens, IDs, and padded sequences.
research_question: Does an explicit tokenizer produce reproducible sequences suitable for fair architecture comparisons?
hypothesis: A train-fitted word tokenizer with explicit special tokens will provide stable bounded-length inputs.
random_seed_policy: primary seed 42; retained comparisons repeat seeds 42, 43, and 44
safety_notes: Do not load, inspect, score, or tune against the locked test split.
